name: TRUMP BREAKOUT
short_description: The Ultimate Evolution of the Classic Breakout, Reborn for the Modern Era.Aim for high scores with combos! With block arrangements that change every time you play, this endlessly fresh version of Breakout never gets old.
detailed_description:
The Ultimate Evolution of the Classic Breakout, Reborn for the Modern Era
Aim for high scores with combos! With block arrangements that change every time you play, this endlessly fresh version of Breakout never gets old. Packed with features like stage selection and a 9-tier ranking system, it's a satisfying experience from start to finish.

Game Features

  • Combo System: Rack up massive scores by destroying blocks in quick succession!

  • Randomized Layouts: Block arrangements change every time — with over 30,000 possible variations!

  • Stage Selection: Freely choose any stage from 1 to 10 and take on the challenge.

  • Ranking System: Your score and progress are graded across 9 ranks, from S+ to E.

  • Beautiful Graphics: Cool and stunning visuals with effects reminiscent of 1980s arcade games.

  • Game Over Conditions: The tension runs high — five mistakes and it's game over.

Major Update Coming May 2025!

With this major update, the game has evolved into an entirely new dimension of Breakout.
Rebuilt from the ground up and featuring a complete graphics overhaul, the combo system adds a whole new layer of fun to score attacks.
While staying true to the soul of the classic, this modern version will captivate today’s players as well.
Get ready for a cool and emotional Breakout experience like never before.
Note: Please uninstall the previous version before reinstalling the update.

A Tribute to the 1970s

I created this game out of a deep passion for Atari’s Breakout from the 1970s.
I still vividly remember the shock and excitement I felt experiencing it in an era when video games were barely a thing.
Its simple yet addictive gameplay, the slowly advancing blocks, and the thrill of testing your reflexes — I wanted to relive that magic, and that’s what drove me to make this.
Breakout is back after 50 years. Are you ready to take on the challenge?
